items.name: Ancestral Vampire Horns
items.description:
These horns are a macabre relic of pure vampiric lineage, crafted from polished obsidian fused with coagulated blood.

They are intense black with dark red veins, cold and smooth to the touch, yet feature sharp protrusions signaling their predatory nature. Their curvature is elegant and dangerous, ending in thirsty points. The base bears subtle runic engravings symbolizing pacts of immortality and the power of the night.
